title: vitex negundo var. bicolor
intro: Vitex negundo var. bicolor, also known as the five-leaved chaste tree or five-leaf chaste tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitex negundo var. bicolor include relief from menstrual disorders, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of the plant can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and it is also used in the form of essential oil for aromatherapy.
